full_text:
iPDC manuscript questions for Ashwini

María and Matilda 25.11.2024

Media

IL-2, IL-7 and IL-15 cytokine testing? Results?

Data for the media optimization in general, where to find these?

What was the readout?

Culture harvesting timepoint

Was there any experiment on how long the iPDCs can be cultured, to motivate the harvesting timepoints?

Flow cytometry

Which samples were not compensated? Was any of these included in the manuscript?

CYTO vs manual analysis (flow cytometry)

Are there comparisons?

María is planning to do another Flow experiment to demonstrate Flow scatterplots, with more cells and FMO controls etc. to increase credibility.

Are there some other simple experimental things that we could do to enhance the paper?
